description: The 12 Anthropic leading indicators the bitter-lesson watcher monitors (plan 033 § 14.11.1). One row per indicator. A 'hit' is a structured-source change (new GitHub release tag, RSS entry, JSON-schema presence) or — for the 2 prose sources (#1, #6) — a prose-content change that survives a 7-day disposition window before escalation (§ 14.11.3, <5% flake budget). The disposition matrix (§ 14.11.2) counts firings by severity into a verdict. Authority: 000-docs/063-AT-SPEC-leading-indicator-watcher. Mirrors the deterministic-detection + typed-fetch-failure posture of the spec-drift watcher (scripts/spec-drift-check.sh, scripts/fetch-capture.py): only a clean fetch (FETCH_OK) feeds disposition; a fetch failure alerts but is NEVER a hit. The poller that consumes this list is scripts/leading-indicator-watch.py; the daily cron is .github/workflows/leading-indicator-watch.yml.

source_kinds.github-release: the latest tagged release of a GitHub repo (releases.atom <id>) — structured; escalates immediately on a new tag
source_kinds.rss: an Atom/RSS feed's latest entry id — structured; escalates immediately on a new entry
source_kinds.json-schema: presence/identity of a machine-readable JSON/TS schema artifact — structured; escalates immediately on a new schema landing
source_kinds.prose: a human-readable doc/blog page — UNstructured; a content change holds for a 7-day disposition window before it counts as an escalating hit (§ 14.11.3)

disposition_matrix.action: Note in next AAR; no plan change
ISEDC Class-2 retrospective; consider pausing Phase >= 3
PAUSE all SAK phases; ISEDC Class-1 re-charter to evaluate upstream cutover
STOP SAK; archive as historical contribution; cut over to upstream

indicators.indicator: Anthropic publishes public roadmap including machine-readable spec
Anthropic publishes machine-readable agentskills.io v2 schemas
Anthropic ships skill-author-onboarding doc citing field validation
claude-codemod or equivalent field-migration tool ships
Frontier model demonstrates schema-validator equivalence from prose+examples
